purpose: Open or refresh a promotion PR from git.defaultBranch to release.releaseBranch. No agent.

dry-run.description: Print plan without running deploy/notify commands.

issue.description: Issue/PR number post terminal notice on. Auto-injected by dispatch.

goal.description: Managed goal id to report promotion PR evidence to.

success: release-promote completes and returns a valid canonical result
failure: release-promote cannot return a valid canonical result
